---
name: New probe or tool
about: Propose a new sensor probe or agent tool
title: "[probe/tool] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**What should it monitor or do?**
Describe the service, metric, or capability.

**Is this a probe (Python sensor) or tool (TypeScript agent)?**
- [ ] Probe (`sensors/probes/`)
- [ ] Tool (`agent/src/tools/`)

**What data does it expose?**
Describe the metrics or events it would write/read.

**Does this work air-gapped?**
Must work without internet. If it requires external access, explain the opt-in mechanism.

**Reference**
Any existing APIs, protocols, or similar implementations to reference.
